title: lomatium ciliolatum
intro: Lomatium ciliolatum, also known as white lomatium or white meadow rue, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Lomatium ciliolatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
